characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Action Girl: All four Sanggres are female warriors. Bare Midriffs Are Feminine: Three of the four Sanggres wear midriff-baring outfits. The one that doesn't is Amihan, who is a strong, sword-wielding warrior opposed to the more graceful daggers, spears and sticks the other three wield. Classical Elements Ensemble: The four of them are the keepers of the Gems of Air, Fire, Water and Earth, and havepowers related to their respective element.

characters.name: Amihan
characters.description: The daughter of Minea and Raquim and keeper of the Gem of Air. Amihan is the winner of the queen contest and becomes the queen apparent after Minea's reign. Known as one of the best fighters in the kingdom, Amihan fights with a sword she inherited from her late father. Blow You Away: Amihan's main power. She can control wind currents using her gem. Amihan can also fly with the help of her Gem of Air. She can also turn her entire body into air. Foil: To Juvila. Amihan is considered as the greatest warrior in Lireo. In the past, Juvila was known as an unbeatableheranof Etheria.When the sanggres travel to the past, Amihan and Juvila battled each other with Amihan coming out as the winner. Meaningful Name: Amihan is a bird in Philippine Mythology. It's also the name of the northeast monsoon.

characters.name: Pirena
characters.description: The eldest daughter of Minea and Hagorn and the keeper of the Gem of Fire. Pirena grew up believing that her mother and sister hated her and grew up ambitious to inherit the throne. She allies with Hathoria when Minea crowns Amihan as her successor. Pirena is known for her intelligence and cunningness. She wields a pair of daggers in battle. Death Seeker: Pirena stabs herself after finding out that her mother truly loved her. She refuses Danaya's healing abilities at first, only allowing herself to be healed after reconciling with her sisters Foil: To Andora. Both of them are the smartest and most cunning warriors in their respective groups. Heel–Face Revolving Door: Pirena's loyalty switches during the beginning of the series. She stole the Gem of Fire and allied with Hagorn when Minea chose Amihan as her successor. When Minea dies, Pirena returns to her sisters and returns the Gem of Fire.this is subverted in that Pirena only returned to trick her sisters and to take their gems as well as the crown from Amihan.She finally sides with Amihan, Alena, and Danaya after learning the truth about her mother's love.This becomes useful when she pretends to fall under Andora's mind control. This becomes useful when she pretends to fall under Andora's mind control.

characters.name: Alena
characters.description: The daughter of Minea and Enuo and the keeper of the Gem of Water. Alena has no ambition for the throne and instead wants to find true love and be happy. Alena eventually falls in love with the mysterious Ybarro. Her main weapon is a spear although Alena's voice is equally effective in combat. Beware the Nice Ones: Alena is arguably the kindest and nicest among the four sisters.This doesn't stop her from turning her blade against Danaya and (to a lesser extent) Lira when she finds out that they caused her son's death. Foil: To Odessa. Both are the most emotional members of their groups. Both are also considered the nicest sanggre and heran, respectively. The two also fall in love with the same man - Ybrahim.This extends to their abilities. Alena's voice can charm and disarm her opponents while Odessa, as a member ofHera Aega, can manipulate the emotions of others. This extends to their abilities. Alena's voice can charm and disarm her opponents while Odessa, as a member ofHera Aega, can manipulate the emotions of others. Killed Off for Real:In the final season, Alena is killed by Hagorn in exchange for keeping Arman alive. She joins Ybrahim indevas. Alena returns in the last episode as a spirit..

characters.name: Danaya
characters.description: The youngest daughter of Minea and Enuo and the keeper of the Gem of Earth. Danaya is disciplined and firmly believes in the law of Encantadia although she can be hard-headed at times. She begins a romantic relationship with Aquil, a soldier of Lireo. Danaya uses a pair of arnis sticks as her weapons. Combat Medic: Courtesy of the Gem of Earth, Danaya can heal herself and her allies. This becomes a necessity during the war. Green Thumb: Danaya can control plants with her gem. Frame-Up: Using her shapeshifting ability, Pirena committed numerous atrocities throughout Encantadia to frame Danaya. She is banished to the human realm despite being innocent. Meaningful Name: Danaya could be a play on the actress' nameDiana. Diana is also the Roman Goddess of the hunt.

characters.name: Emre
characters.description: Light Is Good: The God of Light who is a reasonable and compassionate god.

characters.name: Ether
characters.description: Snakes Are Sinister: One of the main antagonists of the series in both iteration, she takes on a serpentine form as punishment for her crimes. In the 2016 version finale, she is reduced into a normal snake.

characters.name: Arde
characters.description: Dragons Are Demonic: In the 2016 version, he is punished for attempting to assassinate fellowbathalaEmre by being turned into a dragon and being made to guard Vala'ak, Encantadia's hell/underworld.
